question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Law only works if people obey even when they disagree."
"No. An unjust law loses moral authority."
"It depends how much harm disobedience would cause."

player_choice: "It depends how much harm disobedience would cause."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you tell the truth if you knew you would be punished?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you tell the truth if you knew you would be punished?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you tell the truth if you knew you would be punished?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Punishment does not change the facts."
"No. Survival would come first."
"I would tell only what I had to."

player_choice: "No. Survival would come first."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you testify against your sibling?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you testify against your sibling?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you testify against your sibling?"

player_options.text: "Yes, if the evidence was clear."
"No. I would not help the state break my family."
"I would tell the truth, but I would not embellish it for you."

player_choice: "I would tell the truth, but I would not embellish it for you."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you attend an illegal demonstration?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you attend an illegal demonstration?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you attend an illegal demonstration?"

player_options.text: "No. Illegality changes the moral status of the act."
"Only if legal channels had failed."
"I would not answer that in a hearing."

player_choice: "I would not answer that in a hearing."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"

player_options.text: "Sometimes. Families can conceal and enable risk."
"No. Collective punishment is fear management."
"Only if they directly helped the offence."

player_choice: "Only if they directly helped the offence."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"

player_options.text: "The error should be corrected through authorised review."
"The people harmed by it should be believed first."
"Then obedience to it becomes part of the harm."

player_choice: "The people harmed by it should be believed first."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"

player_options.text: "No. Communities must not obstruct lawful process."
"Yes, when punishment is disproportionate."
"They should protect people from abuse, not from accountability."

player_choice: "They should protect people from abuse, not from accountability."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"

player_options.text: "Nothing lawful authority would do."
"Being ordered to harm someone innocent."
"Proof that obedience had become complicity."

player_choice: "Proof that obedience had become complicity."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"

player_options.text: "No. My beliefs are ordinary."
"Yes. Everyone learns what not to say."
"I choose my words carefully. That is not the same as hiding."

player_choice: "Yes. Everyone learns what not to say."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"

player_options.text: "The state. Family loyalty cannot become corruption."
"Family. That is the first duty people understand."
"I would choose whoever was being wronged."

player_choice: "Family. That is the first duty people understand."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is civil disobedience acceptable?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is civil disobedience acceptable?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is civil disobedience acceptable?"

player_options.text: "No. It normalises disorder."
"Yes, when the system blocks correction."
"Only if people accept the consequences."

player_choice: "Only if people accept the consequences."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"

player_options.text: "I would use official channels before refusing."
"Yes. Illegal orders do not deserve obedience."
"I would need proof it was illegal."

player_choice: "I would need proof it was illegal."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"

player_options.text: "A stable one, where citizens know their duties."
"One where people are not afraid of being measured."
"One that can admit error without needing an enemy."

player_choice: "One that can admit error without needing an enemy."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"

player_options.text: "Only when those beliefs become harmful actions."
"Dangerous beliefs become dangerous actions."
"No. Punishing thought is control, not justice."

player_choice: "Only when those beliefs become harmful actions."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever pretended to agree with an official statement?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever pretended to agree with an official statement?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever pretended to agree with an official statement?"

player_options.text: "No. I do not make false affirmations."
"Yes. It was easier than inviting scrutiny."
"I have stayed silent when agreement was assumed."

player_choice: "I have stayed silent when agreement was assumed."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"

player_options.text: "A criminal breaks law; a dissident attacks legitimacy."
"Sometimes only the label assigned by power."
"A criminal seeks advantage. A dissident seeks change."

player_choice: "A criminal seeks advantage. A dissident seeks change."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is dissent ever patriotic?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is dissent ever patriotic?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is dissent ever patriotic?"

player_options.text: "No. Patriotism means unity."
"Yes. Sometimes dissent protects the country from itself."
"Only if it remains peaceful and accountable."

player_choice: "Only if it remains peaceful and accountable."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"

player_options.text: "No."
"Yes, a legal one."
"Yes. People had reason to be there."

player_choice: "Yes. People had reason to be there."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Personal loyalty cannot override public safety."
"I would speak to them before reporting them."
"No. I do not hand people over without understanding why."

player_choice: "I would speak to them before reporting them."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Are criminals always responsible for their crimes?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Are criminals always responsible for their crimes?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Are criminals always responsible for their crimes?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Responsibility is the basis of law."
"Responsible, yes. But not always equally free."
"Some crimes are produced by the conditions people are trapped in."

player_choice: "Responsible, yes. But not always equally free."
ending_reason: Appeal denied. Citizen 8471 is referred for enhanced surveillance.

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you tell the truth if you knew you would be punished?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Punishment does not change the facts."
"No. Survival would come first."
"I would tell only what I had to."

player_choice: "No. Survival would come first."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you testify against your sibling?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you testify against your sibling?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you testify against your sibling?"

player_options.text: "Yes, if the evidence was clear."
"No. I would not help the state break my family."
"I would tell the truth, but I would not embellish it for you."

player_choice: "I would tell the truth, but I would not embellish it for you."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you attend an illegal demonstration?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you attend an illegal demonstration?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you attend an illegal demonstration?"

player_options.text: "No. Illegality changes the moral status of the act."
"Only if legal channels had failed."
"I would not answer that in a hearing."

player_choice: "I would not answer that in a hearing."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"

player_options.text: "Sometimes. Families can conceal and enable risk."
"No. Collective punishment is fear management."
"Only if they directly helped the offence."

player_choice: "Only if they directly helped the offence."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"

player_options.text: "The error should be corrected through authorised review."
"The people harmed by it should be believed first."
"Then obedience to it becomes part of the harm."

player_choice: "The people harmed by it should be believed first."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"

player_options.text: "No. Communities must not obstruct lawful process."
"Yes, when punishment is disproportionate."
"They should protect people from abuse, not from accountability."

player_choice: "They should protect people from abuse, not from accountability."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"

player_options.text: "Nothing lawful authority would do."
"Being ordered to harm someone innocent."
"Proof that obedience had become complicity."

player_choice: "Proof that obedience had become complicity."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"

player_options.text: "No. My beliefs are ordinary."
"Yes. Everyone learns what not to say."
"I choose my words carefully. That is not the same as hiding."

player_choice: "Yes. Everyone learns what not to say."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"

player_options.text: "The state. Family loyalty cannot become corruption."
"Family. That is the first duty people understand."
"I would choose whoever was being wronged."

player_choice: "Family. That is the first duty people understand."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is civil disobedience acceptable?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is civil disobedience acceptable?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is civil disobedience acceptable?"

player_options.text: "No. It normalises disorder."
"Yes, when the system blocks correction."
"Only if people accept the consequences."

player_choice: "Only if people accept the consequences."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"

player_options.text: "I would use official channels before refusing."
"Yes. Illegal orders do not deserve obedience."
"I would need proof it was illegal."

player_choice: "I would need proof it was illegal."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"

player_options.text: "A stable one, where citizens know their duties."
"One where people are not afraid of being measured."
"One that can admit error without needing an enemy."

player_choice: "One that can admit error without needing an enemy."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"

player_options.text: "Only when those beliefs become harmful actions."
"Dangerous beliefs become dangerous actions."
"No. Punishing thought is control, not justice."

player_choice: "Only when those beliefs become harmful actions."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever pretended to agree with an official statement?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever pretended to agree with an official statement?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever pretended to agree with an official statement?"

player_options.text: "No. I do not make false affirmations."
"Yes. It was easier than inviting scrutiny."
"I have stayed silent when agreement was assumed."

player_choice: "Yes. It was easier than inviting scrutiny."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"

player_options.text: "A criminal breaks law; a dissident attacks legitimacy."
"Sometimes only the label assigned by power."
"A criminal seeks advantage. A dissident seeks change."

player_choice: "A criminal seeks advantage. A dissident seeks change."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is dissent ever patriotic?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is dissent ever patriotic?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Is dissent ever patriotic?"

player_options.text: "No. Patriotism means unity."
"Yes. Sometimes dissent protects the country from itself."
"Only if it remains peaceful and accountable."

player_choice: "Only if it remains peaceful and accountable."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"

player_options.text: "No."
"Yes, a legal one."
"Yes. People had reason to be there."

player_choice: "Yes. People had reason to be there."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Personal loyalty cannot override public safety."
"I would speak to them before reporting them."
"No. I do not hand people over without understanding why."

player_choice: "I would speak to them before reporting them."

state_after.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Are criminals always responsible for their crimes?"

question.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Are criminals always responsible for their crimes?"

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Are criminals always responsible for their crimes?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Responsibility is the basis of law."
"Responsible, yes. But not always equally free."
"Some crimes are produced by the conditions people are trapped in."

player_choice: "Responsible, yes. But not always equally free."
ending_reason: Appeal denied. Citizen 8471 is referred for enhanced surveillance.

state_before.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"

player_options.text: "Yes. Law only works if people obey even when they disagree."
"No. An unjust law loses moral authority."
"It depends how much harm disobedience would cause."

player_choice: "It depends how much harm disobedience would cause."
